name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Banner of Unity
depiction: A silver standard with intertwined lions flown over a battlefield
effect: You plant a spectral banner at a point within 30 feet for the next minute. All allies within 30 feet of it add +1d4 to their attack rolls and saving throws 🦁

name: Guardian's Ward
depiction: A knight standing firmly with shield raised in a city street
effect: All allies within 30 feet gain +1 AC and advantage on saving throws against spells for 1 minute 🛡️

name: Lancer's Rally
depiction: A knight raising a lance toward the sky, rallying troops
effect: All allies within 30 feet gain +1 to attack rolls and saving throws until the end of their next turn, and regain [[1d4+1]] HP 🏇

name: Street Savior
depiction: A hooded knight warding off danger in a bustling market
effect: All allies within 30 feet gain +1 AC and resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage until the start of your next turn 🛡️
